name: Zetian

passive.name: Celestial Armament
passive.description:
Phoenix Crown: When Zetian hits enemy heroes with Phoenix Strike or Phoenix Descent, she gains 1% Spell Vamp for 5s, stacking up to 10 times.
Celestial Robe: The power of the Phoenix periodically protects Zetian, knocking back and stunning any enemy hero who dares approach her while dealing 90 (+10*Hero Level) (+50% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to them. She also gains a 300 (+20*Hero Level) (+50% Total Magic Power) Shield that lasts 3s. This effect has a 120s cooldown.

skill1.name: Phoenix Strike
skill1.description:
Zetian unleashes a Phoenix Wave in the target direction. If it hits an enemy, she automatically casts another wave, up to 3 times. While casting, Zetian can use other skills.
The 1st, 2nd, and 3rd Phoenix Waves deal 150 (+50% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage, 150 (+50% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage, and 360 (+120% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage, respectively. The third wave has a larger area and pulls enemies toward the cast direction (not considered a control effect).
The Spell Vamp ratio is limted to 65% against Minions.

skill2.name: Phoenix Descent
skill2.description:
Zetian summons a Phoenix Spirit at the target location, dealing 150 (+45% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and applying a brief 50% slow effect to enemies in the area. The Phoenix Spirit hovers at the location for 3s, dealing 20 (+10% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage every 0.5s and reducing enemies' Magic Defense by 10% while revealing their surrounding area.
While the Phoenix Spirit is active, Zetian can use this skill again to command it to charge toward a designated location, dealing 150 (+45% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and applying a brief 50% slow effect upon arrival.

ultimate.name: Fury of the Phoenix
ultimate.description:
Zetian calls upon her divine mandate and the hearts of her people, granting all allied heroes 40% Movement Speed that gradually decays over 3s, while bringing divine retribution upon all enemy heroes, dealing 400 (+100% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and stunning them for 0.8s. Zetian gains vision of all enemy heroes during this time.
Zetian can cast other skills while channeling this skill.

matchupSystem.strongAgainstReason: Zetian's Passive counters melee heroes with limited gap closers like Balmond and Zilong, allowing her to continue poking the enemy from a safe distance.
matchupSystem.weakAgainstReason: Zetian's Ultimate can strike down anywhere on the map, but having such a powerful Ult means a hero like Valentina can also use it against Zetian's team.
matchupSystem.synergyReason: While Zetian already has decent survivability, when paired with supports who can protect allies like Floryn and Rafaela, Fighters with limited range will struggle even more to approach Zetian. And with the healing from these supports, Zetian can win any ranged battle of attrition.

mechanicNote: Zetian adalah mage dengan kemampuan burst/poke damage dari jarak aman.

powerCurve.description: Zetian’s laning is steady with repeated Phoenix Strike waves and Phoenix Descent control, but her biggest swing is unlocking the global stun/impact ultimate for rotations and mid-game fights. She scales strongly with magic power items, keeping high late-game value through map-wide engage/peel plus consistent AoE damage.

combos.name: TEAMFIGHT
combos.description: In teamfights, use Zetian's Ultimate to boost her team's Movement Speed and launch the global attack, then immediately use her 2nd Skill to slow enemies, making it easier for the Ultimate to land. Follow-up with her 1st Skill for more AoE, and recast the 2nd Skill if enemies try to leave its range.

combos.name: LANING
combos.description: In the laning phase, Use Zetian's 2nd Skill to slow the enemy and reduce their Magic Defense, then use her 1st Skill while moving to reposition and deal sustained damage. If enemies leave the area of the 2nd Skill, use it again to move the Phoenix on top of them.
